nasb.text: Now therefore, here is the king whom you have chosen, whom you have asked for, and behold, the Lord has set a king over you.

esv.text: And now behold the king whom you have chosen, for whom you have asked; behold, the Lord has set a king over you.

cnv.text: 現在，你們所揀選、所要求的王在這裡。看哪！耶和華已經立了一個王統治你們。

ccb.text: 现在，你们所求所选的王在这里，耶和华为你们立了一位王。
